title: Polly Put The Kettle On
content:
Polly, put the kettle on,
    Polly, put the kettle on,
    Polly, put the kettle on,
    We'll all have tea.

    Sukey, take it off again,
    Sukey, take it off again,
    Sukey, take it off again,
    They've all gone away.
meaning:
"Polly Put The Kettle On" is a quintessential example of Walter Crane's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
